chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P No.D-213 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA 5583/18 06.03.2019 Mr. Roshan Ali Azeem Mallah advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. alongwith Mr. Nasiruddin Talpur, Accountant, District Court, Badin. -.-.-. We have seen the comments filed by learned District and Sessions Jude, Badin dated 13.12.2018 and dispose of the listed application with direction to him to consider the case of the petitioner in compliance of a common order dated 19.09.2017, which was passed in several petitions including the present one, as and when a fresh process of appointment is initiated. Let a copy of this order be communicated to the learned District and Sessions Judge, Badin for his perusal and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
